basicInfo.name: Guan Yu
basicInfo.flavor: Afterwards, Guan Yu stabilized the land, earned the support of the people, and was crowned King Muan. In gratitude, he ruled the realm safely and peacefully.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 30% chance to inflict Unable to Recover. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Adds Effect: 30% chance to inflict Unable to Recover. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

Skill 1.name: Crescent Dragon's Fury
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - 100% chance to inflict 3 Buff Removal(s).
 - Deals Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 390% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 470% of Physical Attack.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: 100% Crit Rate Boost.

Skill 2.name: Lead the Charge
Skill 2.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants 2 Debuff Removal(s).
 - Grants Continuous Healing for each debuff removed. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]
 - Can be used only if the ally has a removable buff.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Adds Effect: All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]

Passive.name: Peerless Warrior
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Shock Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Shock Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Back Row Allies
 - Grants Physical Damage Boost. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Physical Damage Boost upon using any attack 2 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Physical Damage Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Physical Damage Boost upon using any attack 2 time(s). [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Turns: Physical Damage Boost duration becomes 3 turn(s).
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Back Row Allies
 - Adds Effect: 40% Crit Damage Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Adds Effect: 40% chance to grant Crit Damage Boost upon using any attack 2 time(s). [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Zhuge Liang, Zhao Yun, alcohol, peaches, jujubes, Go, loyalty
profile.story: Afterwards, Guan Yu stabilized the land, earned the support of the people, and was crowned King Muan. In gratitude, he ruled the realm safely and peacefully.

basicInfo.name: Guan Yu
basicInfo.flavor: As forces to restore order gradually grew, Guan Yu joined them. Among them, were five outstanding generals, known as the Five Tiger Generals. Of them, Guan Yu stood out as the most capable.

basicInfo.name: Guan Yu
basicInfo.flavor: After the rise of the Seven Knights, the world fell into turmoil and unrest. Taking advantage of this chaos, corrupt forces emerged seeking to establish their own world order. Guan Yu aimed to defeat these forces and restore peace to the world.
